message:
fix: correctness and type-safety fixes across web app, tests, and CLI

- Fix AnimatePresence in BasketSidebar to wrap both empty and populated states,
  preventing exit animation failures when toggling between them
- Hoist layout prop to parent motion.div in PromptGrid so AnimatePresence can
  animate the correct element
- Sort selected tags first in TagFilter for better UX discoverability
- Reset TerminalStream animation when text prop changes (derived state pattern)
- Delay URL.revokeObjectURL in PromptDetailModal to prevent premature revocation
  before browser starts download
- Include minRating in active filter count and dependency array on home page
- Preserve sort param when clearing filters in useFilterState
- Use .charAt(0) instead of [0]! in recommendation-helpers for safer access
- Add .catch() to unhandled getRegistryVersion promise in service workers
- Fix CLI random command off-by-one: divide by 0x100000000 not 0xFFFFFFFF so
  the result is in [0, 1) not [0, 1]
- Add write backpressure handling in CLI update-cli download stream
- Return response data on API client errors for better error diagnostics
- Fix 30+ test files: add NextRequest signal property, use vi.stubEnv for
  NODE_ENV mutations, add missing vi imports, destructure framer-motion props
  in mocks to prevent DOM warnings, update mock return shapes to match current
  hook interfaces (useRating, usePWAInstall, useLeaderboard, useSwipeGesture)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
